regional_cost_note: Commercial cleaners in Gisborne typically charge $32–$58/hr for office cleaning, $2–$6/m² for construction cleans, and $3–$9/m² for high-pressure washing. Gisborne rates are typically 10–15% below the national average; some specialist trades travel from Hawke's Bay. Confirm whether cleaning products, equipment, and waste disposal are included in the quoted rate.
